charts.title: HU SB Jam — 3bb
charts.notes: Heads-up blind-vs-blind. SB(button) open-jams 3bb or folds. Nash (chip-EV, no ICM) via fictitious play on exact MC equities. SB jams 77.7% of hands. Card-removal in range weighting is not modeled (standard simplification); ranges match published HU Nash charts within MC noise.

charts.title: HU BB Call vs Jam — 3bb
charts.notes: BB facing a 3bb SB open-jam: call or fold (Nash). BB calls 91.9% of hands. Pairs and big aces are the last to drop as the jam stack grows.
